script:
set +e
echo '=== per-user bots: last 5 error lines each, focus on claude rc/timeout/login ==='
for b in aixa alejandro ashley cameron david emily-claude gabriel jesus-reyes neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid; do
  echo "--- $b ---"
  grep -E 'claude (rc=|timeout|rate-limited|spawn)|Not logged in|empty reply|first attempt failed' /home/azureuser/.${b}-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -6
done
echo '=== CLAUDE constant in a couple of per-user responders ==='
grep -n '^CLAUDE\s*=' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py /home/azureuser/alejandro-responder.py /home/azureuser/cameron-responder.py /home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== /home/azureuser/.claude listing (credentials store) ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=== claude --version + auth status ==='
sudo -u azureuser /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude --version 2>&1
sudo -u azureuser bash -c 'echo health | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '===END==='
